# 🤖 Python Modular Chatbot

A modular chatbot built using Python and Object-Oriented Programming.

## 🚀 Features

- Dynamic name memory
- Emotion detection (sad, happy, tired)
- Randomized greetings
- Conversation history
- Message counter
- Clean modular structure

## 📁 Project Structure

chatbot-project/
│
├── main.py
└── bot/
    ├── __init__.py
    ├── logic.py
    └── memory.py

## 🛠 Technologies Used

- Python
- OOP (Classes & Methods)
- Modular Architecture

## ▶️ How to Run

```bash
python main.py
